use_cases: Display article or blog post previews with thumbnail images in a link card format
Showcase portfolio projects or case studies with hover animations
Create product feature cards with background images and overlay text
Build navigation hubs linking to external resources or documentation
Display resource cards in knowledge bases or help centers
ai_summary: A sleek link card component featuring framer-motion hover animations with scale and translate effects, displaying a title, description, and background image. The card uses a bottom-right positioned illustration with text overlay, rounded corners, borders, and subtle shadows. Built for versatile use in content-heavy interfaces, offering spring-based physics animations for polished interactions.
